scenario.name: SIP REGISTER with Multiple Users
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 To: <sip:[username]@[remote_ip]> From: <sip:[username]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[username]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Expires: 3600 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 To: <sip:[username]@[remote_ip]> From: <sip:[username]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[username]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Authorization: Digest username="[username]", realm="asterisk", nonce="[nonce]", uri="sip:[remote_ip]", response="[md5]" Expires: 60 Content-Length: 0

REGISTER sip:[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 To: <sip:[username]@[remote_ip]> From: <sip:[username]@[remote_ip]>;tag=[call_number] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[username]@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Authorization: Digest username="[username]", realm="asterisk", nonce="[nonce]", uri="sip:[remote_ip]", response="[md5]" Expires: 60 Content-Length: 0
